resources.title: Prometheus Formatter Chrome extension
resources.evidence_quote: By the way, there is a Chrome plugin, which is really cool. It's called Prometheus Formatter.

resources.title: Prometheus best practices docs page on histograms and summaries
resources.evidence_quote: There's a page in the Prometheus best practices docs that really goes deeper into that comparison if if someone wants to look at that more.

resources.title: kube-prometheus Prometheus rules manifests
resources.evidence_quote: If you go to if you search for cube dash Prometheus, which is a project initially by oh, sorry. No. Like, Google. Yeah. Yeah. Dash dash Prometheus. Yep. That's fine. And then press t, and then you press rules. And then you go to the manifest slash Prometheus rules.

resources.title: Cortex monitoring project
resources.evidence_quote: There's, for example, Cortex initially started by Weaveworks. Now it's more dominant, I guess, lead led by Grafana Labs and others
